synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-3032 Important: Oracle Linux 8 munge security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-3032

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-3032.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
munge-0.5.13-3.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
munge-devel-0.5.13-3.el8_10.i686.rpm
munge-devel-0.5.13-3.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
munge-libs-0.5.13-3.el8_10.i686.rpm
munge-libs-0.5.13-3.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
munge-0.5.13-3.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
munge-devel-0.5.13-3.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
munge-libs-0.5.13-3.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/munge-0.5.13-3.el8_10.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2026-25506




Description of changes:

[0.5.13-3]
- Fix CVE-2026-25506
- Resolves: RHEL-148521
